mxCell.value:
flowchart LR EG[Execution / Governance] --> RC[Risk & Compliance] RC --> DBO[Digital Backend Ops] DBO --> WEB[Website] WEB --> AW[Analytics Wiring] AW --> BI[Business Intelligence] BI -. feedback .-> RC
BM[Brand Mgmt] --> SEO[SEO] BM --> SM[Social Media] WEB --> SEO WEB --> SM SEO --> LSEO[Local SEO] SM --> CC[Content Creation] CC --> ADS[Ads] AW --> ADS AW --> LEAD[Lead Acquisition] ADS --> LEAD LSEO --> GBP[GBP] SM --> GBP GBP --> REP[Reputation Mgmt] LEAD --> REP

UserObject.label: ## Draw.io CSV import ## Paste into: Arrange > Insert > Advanced > CSV ## label: %label% ## style: rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;align=center;verticalAlign=middle; ## connect: {"from":"refs","to":"id","style":"endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;html=1;"} ## ignore: refs,shape ## nodespacing: 50 ## levelspacing: 80 ## layout: horizontalflow id,label,refs,shape exec,Execution / Governance,,rounded=1; risk,Risk & Compliance,exec,rounded=1; digital,Digital Backend Ops,risk,rounded=1; website,Website,digital, brand,Brand Mgmt,, seo,SEO,"brand,website", localseo,Local SEO,seo, social,Social Media,"brand,website", content,Content Creation,social, ads,Ads,"content,analytics",rounded=1; analytics,Analytics Wiring,website, bi,Business Intelligence,analytics, lead,Lead Acquisition,"analytics,ads",rounded=1; gbp,GBP,"localseo,social", reputation,Reputation Mgmt,"gbp,lead",
UserObject.link: ## Draw.io CSV import ## Paste into: Arrange > Insert > Advanced > CSV ## label: %label% ## style: rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;align=center;verticalAlign=middle; ## connect: {"from":"refs","to":"id","style":"endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;html=1;"} ## ignore: refs,shape ## nodespacing: 50 ## levelspacing: 80 ## layout: horizontalflow id,label,refs,shape exec,Execution / Governance,,rounded=1; risk,Risk & Compliance,exec,rounded=1; digital,Digital Backend Ops,risk,rounded=1; website,Website,digital, brand,Brand Mgmt,, seo,SEO,"brand,website", localseo,Local SEO,seo, social,Social Media,"brand,website", content,Content Creation,social, ads,Ads,"content,analytics",rounded=1; analytics,Analytics Wiring,website, bi,Business Intelligence,analytics, lead,Lead Acquisition,"analytics,ads",rounded=1; gbp,GBP,"localseo,social", reputation,Reputation Mgmt,"gbp,lead",

UserObject.label: ## Draw.io CSV import ## Paste into: Arrange > Insert > Advanced > CSV ## Fixed per official draw.io CSV syntax: use # for config, ## for comments. # label: %name% # style: whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=14; # namespace: marketingops- # connect: {"from":"refs","to":"id","style":"curved=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;html=1;"} # width: auto # height: auto # padding: 12 # ignore: id,refs # nodespacing: 60 # levelspacing: 100 # edgespacing: 40 # layout: auto ## ---- CSV below this line. First line contains column names. ---- name,id,refs Execution / Governance,exec,"" Risk & Compliance,risk,exec Digital Backend Ops,digital,risk Website,website,digital Analytics Wiring,analytics,website Business Intelligence,bi,analytics Brand Mgmt,brand,"" SEO,seo,"brand,website" Local SEO,localseo,seo Social Media,social,"brand,website" Content Creation,content,social Ads,ads,"content,analytics" Lead Acquisition,lead,"analytics,ads" GBP,gbp,"localseo,social" Reputation Mgmt,reputation,"gbp,lead"
UserObject.link: ## Draw.io CSV import ## Paste into: Arrange > Insert > Advanced > CSV ## Fixed per official draw.io CSV syntax: use # for config, ## for comments. # label: %name% # style: whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=14; # namespace: marketingops- # connect: {"from":"refs","to":"id","style":"curved=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;html=1;"} # width: auto # height: auto # padding: 12 # ignore: id,refs # nodespacing: 60 # levelspacing: 100 # edgespacing: 40 # layout: auto ## ---- CSV below this line. First line contains column names. ---- name,id,refs Execution / Governance,exec,"" Risk & Compliance,risk,exec Digital Backend Ops,digital,risk Website,website,digital Analytics Wiring,analytics,website Business Intelligence,bi,analytics Brand Mgmt,brand,"" SEO,seo,"brand,website" Local SEO,localseo,seo Social Media,social,"brand,website" Content Creation,content,social Ads,ads,"content,analytics" Lead Acquisition,lead,"analytics,ads" GBP,gbp,"localseo,social" Reputation Mgmt,reputation,"gbp,lead"

UserObject.label:
Create an editable draw.io strategy map / operating model diagram based on this structure.

Use a clean whiteboard-style flowchart layout with rectangular boxes, thin black borders, and simple directional arrows. Preserve the rough left-to-right flow from leadership/governance on the left toward analytics, business intelligence, and lead acquisition on the right.

Main nodes and layout:

Top-left:
- Large box: "Execution / Governance"
  - Arrow pointing right to overall downstream system
  - Arrow pointing downward into "Risk & Compliance"

Upper-middle:
- Large box: "Risk & Compliance"
  - Arrow pointing right toward "Business Intelligence"
  - Arrow pointing downward into "Digital Backoffice Ops"

Middle:
- Box: "Digital Backoffice Ops"
  - Connects downward/right into "Website"
- Box below/right: "Website"
  - Connects right into "Analytics Wiring"
  - Connects downward into digital marketing channels

Left-middle:
- Box: "Brand Mgmt"
  - Arrow right toward the digital marketing system
  - Arrow downward toward copywriting / content work

Digital marketing cluster below Website:
- Box: "SEO"
- Box below SEO: "Local SEO"
- Box: "Social Media"
- Box below/right: "Content Creation"
- Box right: "Ads"
- Box below center: "GBP"
- Box bottom: "Reputation Mgmt"

Relationships in the digital marketing cluster:
- Website connects to SEO
- SEO connects to Local SEO
- Website connects to Social Media
- Social Media connects to Content Creation
- Content Creation connects to Ads
- SEO / Local SEO / Social Media / Ads contribute to GBP
- GBP connects down to Reputation Mgmt
- Reputation Mgmt connects back toward Lead Acquisition

Right-middle:
- Large box: "Analytics Wiring"
  - Receives input from Website, Social Media, Content Creation, and Ads
  - Sends arrow upward/right into "Business Intelligence"
  - Sends reporting feedback back into marketing channels

Top-right:
- Large box: "Business Intelligence"
  - Receives data from Analytics Wiring
  - Receives governance/risk input from the left
  - Sends curved feedback arrow downward toward Lead Acquisition and back toward Analytics Wiring

Bottom-right:
- Box: "Lead Acquisition"
  - Receives input from Ads, Analytics Wiring, Business Intelligence, and Reputation Mgmt
  - Add a small emphasis mark or alert icon next to it

Visual style:
- Use editable draw.io shapes, not an image.
- Use rounded rectangles for all boxes.
- Use arrows with visible arrowheads.
- Use dashed connectors for indirect influence or feedback loops.
- Use solid connectors for primary operational flow.
- Keep the diagram readable and spacious.
- Use neutral grayscale colors only.
- Group the digital marketing nodes into a lightly outlined container labeled "Digital Marketing Engine".
- Group Analytics Wiring, Business Intelligence, and Lead Acquisition into a lightly outlined container labeled "Measurement & Growth Loop".
- Preserve the informal whiteboard logic, but make it clean and presentation-ready.

Create an editable draw.io strategy map / operating model diagram based on the attached whiteboard reference.
Use the attachment as the source of truth. Recreate the structure, hierarchy, containers, labels, arrows, and rough layout as faithfully as possible, but make it clean and presentation-ready.
Overall layout: - White canvas - Large outer dashed rounded rectangle container enclosing the full system - Second large dashed rectangular container inside it, starting below "Execution / Governance" and enclosing the operating model - Purple dashed container around the website/digital marketing area - Light gray dashed container inside the purple container around the core marketing-channel cluster - Red dashed rounded container around the tightly connected channel cluster near SEO, Social Media, Content Creation, Ads, and GBP
Top-left: - Box: "Execution / Governance" - Place near the upper-left edge of the outer container - Arrow pointing right into the broader system - Downward influence toward "Risk & Compliance"
Upper-left / middle-left: - Box: "Risk & Compliance" - Large box below Execution / Governance - Arrow or line extending right across the operating model - Curved/downward connection into "Digital Backoffice Ops"
Upper-middle: - Box: "Digital Backoffice Ops" - Below/right of Risk & Compliance - Connects downward into the website/digital operations layer
Center: - Prominent black filled rectangle labeled "WEBSITE" in white uppercase text - Position at the top-center edge of the purple dashed digital marketing container - Make this the visual anchor for the digital marketing system
Left of website cluster: - Box: "Brand Mgmt" - Place inside or near the left edge of the purple dashed container - Connect toward the website / marketing cluster - Handwritten-style note: "Copywriting" - Place below Brand Mgmt - Connect downward into the marketing content flow
Digital marketing cluster inside the gray dashed container: - Box: "SEO" - Box below SEO: "Local SEO" - Box: "Social Media" - Box below/right: "Content Creation" - Box right: "Ads" - Box below center: "GBP" - Box bottom: "Reputation Mgmt"
Marketing relationships: - Website feeds SEO - SEO feeds Local SEO - Website feeds Social Media - Social Media feeds Content Creation - Content Creation feeds Ads - SEO, Local SEO, Social Media, Content Creation, and Ads contribute to GBP - GBP feeds Reputation Mgmt - Reputation Mgmt feeds Lead Acquisition - Ads also feed Lead Acquisition - Use dashed connectors for indirect influence and solid connectors for direct flow
Analytics / BI loop: - Box: "Analytics Wiring" - Place upper-right of the purple website container, inside the larger operating model container - Receive inputs from Website and marketing activity - Send arrow upward/right into Business Intelligence - Box: "Business Intelligence" - Place to the upper-right of Analytics Wiring - Receive input from Analytics Wiring - Show curved feedback arrows from Business Intelligence back toward Analytics Wiring and down toward Lead Acquisition
Right / lower-right: - Box: "Lead Acq!" - Place to the right of the digital marketing cluster and below Business Intelligence - Add a small exclamation/emphasis mark beside it - Receive arrows from Ads, Reputation Mgmt, Analytics Wiring, and Business Intelligence
Visual style: - Editable draw.io shapes only, not a flat image - Rounded rectangles for boxes - Dashed rounded containers for system boundaries - Thin black outlines for normal boxes - Black fill with white text only for "WEBSITE" - Use muted grayscale for containers, purple dashed outline for the website/digital marketing container, and red dashed outline for the inner channel cluster - Keep generous spacing and make labels readable - Preserve the sketch-like operating-model logic while cleaning alignment and connector routing
UserObject.link:
Create an editable draw.io strategy map / operating model diagram based on the attached whiteboard reference.
Use the attachment as the source of truth. Recreate the structure, hierarchy, containers, labels, arrows, and rough layout as faithfully as possible, but make it clean and presentation-ready.
Overall layout: - White canvas - Large outer dashed rounded rectangle container enclosing the full system - Second large dashed rectangular container inside it, starting below "Execution / Governance" and enclosing the operating model - Purple dashed container around the website/digital marketing area - Light gray dashed container inside the purple container around the core marketing-channel cluster - Red dashed rounded container around the tightly connected channel cluster near SEO, Social Media, Content Creation, Ads, and GBP
Top-left: - Box: "Execution / Governance" - Place near the upper-left edge of the outer container - Arrow pointing right into the broader system - Downward influence toward "Risk & Compliance"
Upper-left / middle-left: - Box: "Risk & Compliance" - Large box below Execution / Governance - Arrow or line extending right across the operating model - Curved/downward connection into "Digital Backoffice Ops"
Upper-middle: - Box: "Digital Backoffice Ops" - Below/right of Risk & Compliance - Connects downward into the website/digital operations layer
Center: - Prominent black filled rectangle labeled "WEBSITE" in white uppercase text - Position at the top-center edge of the purple dashed digital marketing container - Make this the visual anchor for the digital marketing system
Left of website cluster: - Box: "Brand Mgmt" - Place inside or near the left edge of the purple dashed container - Connect toward the website / marketing cluster - Handwritten-style note: "Copywriting" - Place below Brand Mgmt - Connect downward into the marketing content flow
Digital marketing cluster inside the gray dashed container: - Box: "SEO" - Box below SEO: "Local SEO" - Box: "Social Media" - Box below/right: "Content Creation" - Box right: "Ads" - Box below center: "GBP" - Box bottom: "Reputation Mgmt"
Marketing relationships: - Website feeds SEO - SEO feeds Local SEO - Website feeds Social Media - Social Media feeds Content Creation - Content Creation feeds Ads - SEO, Local SEO, Social Media, Content Creation, and Ads contribute to GBP - GBP feeds Reputation Mgmt - Reputation Mgmt feeds Lead Acquisition - Ads also feed Lead Acquisition - Use dashed connectors for indirect influence and solid connectors for direct flow
Analytics / BI loop: - Box: "Analytics Wiring" - Place upper-right of the purple website container, inside the larger operating model container - Receive inputs from Website and marketing activity - Send arrow upward/right into Business Intelligence - Box: "Business Intelligence" - Place to the upper-right of Analytics Wiring - Receive input from Analytics Wiring - Show curved feedback arrows from Business Intelligence back toward Analytics Wiring and down toward Lead Acquisition
Right / lower-right: - Box: "Lead Acq!" - Place to the right of the digital marketing cluster and below Business Intelligence - Add a small exclamation/emphasis mark beside it - Receive arrows from Ads, Reputation Mgmt, Analytics Wiring, and Business Intelligence
Visual style: - Editable draw.io shapes only, not a flat image - Rounded rectangles for boxes - Dashed rounded containers for system boundaries - Thin black outlines for normal boxes - Black fill with white text only for "WEBSITE" - Use muted grayscale for containers, purple dashed outline for the website/digital marketing container, and red dashed outline for the inner channel cluster - Keep generous spacing and make labels readable - Preserve the sketch-like operating-model logic while cleaning alignment and connector routing

UserObject.label:
Create an editable draw.io operating model diagram.
Left to right flow: Execution / Governance → Risk & Compliance → Digital Backoffice Ops → Website → Analytics Wiring → Business Intelligence → Lead Acquisition.
Also include Brand Mgmt feeding the marketing system.
Under Website, create a "Digital Marketing Engine" cluster containing: SEO, Local SEO, Social Media, Content Creation, Ads, GBP, Reputation Mgmt.
Connect: Website → SEO → Local SEO Website → Social Media → Content Creation → Ads SEO, Local SEO, Social Media, Ads → GBP GBP → Reputation Mgmt → Lead Acquisition Website, Social Media, Content Creation, Ads → Analytics Wiring Analytics Wiring → Business Intelligence Business Intelligence → Lead Acquisition Business Intelligence → Analytics Wiring as a feedback loop
Use rounded rectangles, solid arrows for direct flow, dashed arrows for feedback/influence, grayscale styling, and clean spacing.
UserObject.link:
Create an editable draw.io operating model diagram.
Left to right flow: Execution / Governance → Risk & Compliance → Digital Backoffice Ops → Website → Analytics Wiring → Business Intelligence → Lead Acquisition.
Also include Brand Mgmt feeding the marketing system.
Under Website, create a "Digital Marketing Engine" cluster containing: SEO, Local SEO, Social Media, Content Creation, Ads, GBP, Reputation Mgmt.
Connect: Website → SEO → Local SEO Website → Social Media → Content Creation → Ads SEO, Local SEO, Social Media, Ads → GBP GBP → Reputation Mgmt → Lead Acquisition Website, Social Media, Content Creation, Ads → Analytics Wiring Analytics Wiring → Business Intelligence Business Intelligence → Lead Acquisition Business Intelligence → Analytics Wiring as a feedback loop
Use rounded rectangles, solid arrows for direct flow, dashed arrows for feedback/influence, grayscale styling, and clean spacing.
